revision.comment: Bot: Creating normal ill redirect for [[Category:Lua-based templates]].
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:MediaWiki:Titleblacklist-forbidden-edit]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[ja:qq]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Pages created from Interlanguage links
Bot: remove obsolete category Automatic wikipedia redirects
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

revision.text: {{#ifexist:$2|Editing|Creation}} of this page ($2) is currently restricted to administrators, page movers, and template editors because the page title matches an entry $1 on the [[Mediawiki:Titleblacklist|local]] or [[m:Title blacklist|global]] blacklists. If you receive this message when trying to edit, create or move an existing page, follow these instructions: * '''Any administrator can {{#ifexist:$2|edit|create}} this page for you.''' Please {{#ifexist:$2|{{submit an edit request/link|display=submit an edit request}}|post a request at the [[Wikipedia:Administrators' noticeboard|Administrators' noticeboard]] or {{submit an edit request/link|display=open a new edit request}}}}.{{#ifexist:$2|| * Be sure to specify the '''exact title''' (especially by [[Help:Link|linking]] it) of the page you are trying to create, and if it might be misunderstood (for example, an article with an unusual name), consider explaining briefly what you want to do.}} * If you wrote any text, '''save it temporarily to your device''' until you can {{#ifexist:$2|edit|create}} the page. Thank you.

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: overwriting with templates included
revision.text: {{#ifexist:$2|Editing|Creation}} of this page ($2) is currently restricted to administrators, page movers, and template editors because the page title matches an entry $1 on the [[Mediawiki:Titleblacklist|local]] or [[m:Title blacklist|global]] blacklists. If you receive this message when trying to edit, create or move an existing page, follow these instructions: * '''Any administrator can {{#ifexist:$2|edit|create}} this page for you.''' Please {{#ifexist:$2|{{submit an edit request/link|display=submit an edit request}}|post a request at the [[Wikipedia:Administrators' noticeboard|Administrators' noticeboard]] or {{submit an edit request/link|display=open a new edit request}}}}.{{#ifexist:$2|| * Be sure to specify the '''exact title''' (especially by [[Help:Link|linking]] it) of the page you are trying to create, and if it might be misunderstood (for example, an article with an unusual name), consider explaining briefly what you want to do.}} * If you wrote any text, '''save it temporarily to your device''' until you can {{#ifexist:$2|edit|create}} the page. Thank you.

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25397554627|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#ifexist:$2|Editing|Creation}} of this page ($2) is currently restricted to administrators, page movers, and template editors because the page title matches an entry $1 on the [[Mediawiki:Titleblacklist|local]] or [[m:Title blacklist|global]] blacklists. If you receive this message when trying to edit, create or move an existing page, follow these instructions: * '''Any administrator can {{#ifexist:$2|edit|create}} this page for you.''' Please {{#ifexist:$2|{{submit an edit request/link|display=submit an edit request}}|post a request at the [[Wikipedia:Administrators' noticeboard|Administrators' noticeboard]] or {{submit an edit request/link|display=open a new edit request}}}}.{{#ifexist:$2|| * Be sure to specify the '''exact title''' (especially by [[Help:Link|linking]] it) of the page you are trying to create, and if it might be misunderstood (for example, an article with an unusual name), consider explaining briefly what you want to do.}} * If you wrote any text, '''save it temporarily to your device''' until you can {{#ifexist:$2|edit|create}} the page. Thank you.
